audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in ldapmodrdn.c are properly guarded: all four strdup call sites check for NULL before use (L169-177, L209-223), fp is either stdin or a checked fopen result, ld is guaranteed non-NULL because tool_conn_setup calls exit() on ldap_initialize failure (common.c:1331-1335), and output parameters of ldap_parse_result (matcheddn, text, refs, ctrls) are null-checked before every dereference in domodrdn (L304-323). The dn/rdn parameters in domodrdn are always non-NULL since both callers verify strdup results before invocation.
